name: wealthville
description: Solana + EVM liquidity-pool scores: Enter/Hold/Exit verdicts and a 0-100 Wealthville Score.
long_description: Wealthville gives your AI assistant a scored, track-recorded answer to "should I LP into this pool?" — Enter/Hold/Exit verdicts and a composite 0-100 Wealthville Score for Solana + EVM liquidity pools, plus a live, immutable, miss-inclusive track record. Four read-only tools wrap the public Wealthville data API; no wallet access, nothing to sign, no API key required (an optional partner key raises the rate limit).

tools.name: get_pool_score
tools.description: Wealthville verdict (ENTER/HOLD/EXIT/AVOID) + scores for one liquidity pool.

tools.name: get_top_pools
tools.description: Liquidity pools ranked by composite Wealthville Score, freshly scored.

tools.name: get_track_record
tools.description: Live signal track record: hit rates, IL-adjusted PnL, recent resolved signals.

tools.name: get_signals_feed
tools.description: Latest published ENTER/EXIT/RISK_OFF signals with narrative and confidence.

WEALTHVILLE_API_KEY.title: API key (optional)
WEALTHVILLE_API_KEY.description: Free partner key for a higher rate limit. Anonymous works at 60 req/min. Get one at https://wealthville.net/developers

WEALTHVILLE_API_URL.title: API base URL (optional)
WEALTHVILLE_API_URL.description: Override the API base URL. Leave blank to use https://wealthville.net
